chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.04 of 2024 Ramzan Sugar Mills Ltd. & others Versus M/s Sindh Modarba Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection/reply “A” 2. For hearing of main case. Dated: 09.04.2024 Mr. Hasham Ahmed Khan for appellants. -.-.- Learned counsel for appellants submits that the dispute between them and respondent is settled out of Court amicably as such they (appellants) have instructed not to press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge
